articles.title: Best spots to catch fireworks this National Day
articles.content: If you didn't manage to snag tickets for NDP 2026, fret not. Here are several locations in Singapore where you can catch the fireworks this National Day. The Kallang Wave Mall is also nearby, for those who want to do some...
